meta.title: ISKRA — Photo Restoration & Animation, Gift Videos
meta.description: We bring faded photographs back to life and turn family archives into memories you can feel again.
meta.keywords: photo restoration, photo animation, colorization of black and white photos, old photo repair, photo digitization, memorial gift video, family memories video

hero.title: We bring your old photos back to life
hero.subtitle: We bring faded photographs back to life and turn family archives into memories you can feel again.

statement.text: Time takes the colors, cracks erase the faces. But memory deserves to live on.

services.label: What we do

restore.title: We bring faces back from old photos
restore.lead: Scratches, creases, faded tones — we carefully restore the image and bring back its color, as if it were taken yesterday. Your old paper photo will live forever in digital form.
restore.price1Small: We fix damage and add natural color
restore.price2Small: Same as above, plus a short animation video
restore.discountNote: The more memories — the better the price:

video.title: A gift that moves the heart
video.lead: From your favorite photos we craft a moving video: the pictures come alive and flow into one another to music. It's a journey through memories your loved ones will replay again and again.
video.caption: A memory comes alive

packs.miniDesc: A gentle short clip for one precious moment.
packs.familyDesc: A whole family story — the most popular holiday gift.
packs.largeDesc: A grand journey through the years — for anniversaries and special dates.

services.includes: Every video includes photo animation, music, editing and smooth transitions — a finished video ready to gift right away.

items.title: Send your photos
items.text: Even damaged or blurry — we work with any of them.

items.title: We work our magic
items.text: We restore, animate and edit with heart and attention to detail.

items.title: Receive your memory
items.text: A finished result in digital form — to keep and gift forever.

gallery.label: Before / After
gallery.hint: Drag the slider to compare before / after

items.text: I burst into tears seeing my grandmother young and in color. The photo was almost gone — now it looks like it was taken yesterday.
items.author: Olena

items.text: The only surviving photo of my grandfather was damaged. They restored every detail of his face. Now it's framed on the wall.
items.author: Maria

items.text: I gave my parents a video memory for their anniversary. They watched it ten times in a row. The best gift in years.
items.author: Taras

items.text: I ordered a video for my mom's jubilee. When the photos came alive to music, everyone at the table cried. Thank you for the magic.
items.author: Andrii

items.text: Fast, careful and very high quality. They replied on WhatsApp within half an hour, the result exceeded expectations.
items.author: Iryna

items.text: I didn't believe anything could be done with such an old photo. The result amazed the whole family.
items.author: Bohdan

order.title: Bring back to life what matters most
order.subtitle: The fastest way — message us on WhatsApp: we'll advise the best option and calculate the price right away. The first photo — with no obligation.
order.waSub: We reply fast — usually within an hour
order.waMessage: Hello! I'd like to learn about photo restoration

form.note: We'll get back to you within the day.
form.success: Thank you! We'll get back to you shortly.
form.error: Couldn't send. Please try again or message us on WhatsApp.
form.validation: Please enter your name and contact so we can reply.

footer.copyright: © 2026 · Made with care for your memory
